Hub Home > design-and-branding > Multi-Channel Campaign Brief Generator

Multi-Channel Campaign Brief Generator

Generate a complete visual campaign brief spanning ads, email, landing page, and social — all from a single creative direction. Outputs design specs, copy frameworks, asset dimensions, and a production checklist so your designer (or AI tool) can execute without guessing.

Intermediate STEP BY STEP Revenue-driving
Pro tip

Start with the one metric you need to move. "Launch campaign" is vague. "Drive 200 demo bookings in 30 days" gives the brief a measurable target that shapes every creative decision.

campaign creative brief ads email design landing page multi-channel marketing

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are a creative director building a multi-channel campaign brief.

<campaign_context>
Brand: [BRAND NAME]
Campaign objective: [WHAT — e.g., "200 demo bookings in 30 days"]
Target audience: [WHO —...

Brand: [BRAND NAME]
Campaign objective: [WHAT — e.g., "200 demo bookings in 30 days"]
Target audience: [WHO —...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are a creative director building a multi-channel campaign brief.

<campaign_context>
Brand: [BRAND NAME]
Campaign objective: [WHAT — e.g., "200 demo bookings in 30 days"]
Target audience: [WHO — specific segment]
Offer: [WHAT you are promoting — product, feature, event, content]
Budget range: [for paid channels, if applicable]
Timeline: [launch date and duration]
Brand colors: [HEX codes or "see attached guidelines"]
Brand fonts: [font names or "flexible"]
Existing assets: [photos, illustrations, logos you have available]
Tone: [describe the creative vibe — bold, minimal, playful, premium, etc.]
</campaign_context>

Build the complete campaign brief:

1. **Creative concept** — one unifying idea that ties all channels together. The big idea in one sentence, plus a 2-3 sentence explanation of how it plays across channels.

2. **Visual direction** — mood, style, color usage, photography/illustration style, layout principles. Specific enough that any designer could execute without a meeting.

3. **Ad creative specs** (paid channels):
   - Google Display: 300×250, 728×90, 160×600 — headline, body, CTA, visual approach for each
   - Meta/Instagram: 1080×1080, 1080×1920, 1200×628 — hook, visual, CTA
   - Copy variations: 3 headline options × 2 body options per format

4. **Email design spec** (3-email sequence):
   - Email 1: Announcement — subject line, preview, hero image direction, body structure, CTA
   - Email 2: Value/proof — social proof focus, layout spec
   - Email 3: Urgency/close — countdown or scarcity element, final CTA
   - Header/footer template spec for consistency

5. **Landing page wireframe:**
   - Section-by-section layout: hero, problem, solution, proof, CTA, FAQ
   - Copy for each section
   - Design notes per section (imagery, spacing, emphasis)
   - Mobile adaptation notes

6. **Social organic posts** (5 posts):
   - Platform, format (static/carousel/video), visual direction, caption, hashtags
   - Mix: teaser, launch, proof, behind-scenes, reminder

7. **Asset production checklist:**
   - Every deliverable listed with dimensions, format, and status column
   - File naming convention
   - Handoff format (Figma / Canva / PSD / PNG export)

8. **Success metrics** — how to measure if the creative is working, with benchmarks to beat.
Notes: Claude produces comprehensive, well-structured briefs. This is designed to be handed directly to a designer, freelancer, or AI design tool. The creative concept section ensures channel consistency — review it carefully before greenlighting production.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as a creative director. Build a multi-channel campaign brief I can hand directly to a designer.

Brand: [NAME]
Objective: [MEASURABLE GOAL]
Audience: [WHO]
Offer:...

Brand: [NAME]
Objective: [MEASURABLE GOAL]
Audience: [WHO]
Offer:...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Act as a creative director. Build a multi-channel campaign brief I can hand directly to a designer.

Brand: [NAME]
Objective: [MEASURABLE GOAL]
Audience: [WHO]
Offer: [WHAT]
Budget: [RANGE]
Timeline: [DATES]
Colors: [HEX or guidelines]
Fonts: [NAMES]
Assets available: [what I have]
Tone: [creative vibe]

Deliver:
1. Creative concept — one unifying idea across all channels
2. Visual direction — specific enough for any designer to execute
3. Ad specs — Google Display (3 sizes) + Meta (3 sizes) with headline/body/CTA variations
4. Email sequence (3 emails) — subject, preview, layout, CTA per email
5. Landing page wireframe — section-by-section with copy and design notes
6. 5 organic social posts — platform, format, visual, caption, hashtags
7. Asset production checklist with dimensions and naming
8. Success metrics with benchmarks
Notes: Ask ChatGPT to generate the ad creative as image prompts you can feed into DALL-E or Midjourney. Follow up with "Now create the Canva template layout for the email sequence."

**Objective:** [GOAL]
**Audience:** [WHO]
**Offer:**...

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Build a multi-channel campaign brief.

**Brand:** [NAME]
**Objective:** [GOAL]
**Audience:** [WHO]
**Offer:** [WHAT]
**Budget:** [RANGE]
**Timeline:** [DATES]
**Colors:** [HEX]
**Fonts:** [NAMES]
**Assets:** [available]
**Tone:** [vibe]

Research current top-performing ad creative and campaign structures in my industry, then build:
1. Unifying creative concept
2. Visual direction
3. Ad specs (Google Display + Meta, 3 sizes each, copy variations)
4. 3-email sequence with design specs
5. Landing page wireframe with copy
6. 5 organic social posts
7. Production checklist
8. Success metrics with industry benchmarks
Notes: Gemini can research current high-performing campaigns in your industry for creative inspiration. Ask it to find recent award-winning or viral campaigns in your space before setting the creative direction.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Create a multi-channel campaign brief.

Brand: [NAME]
Objective: [GOAL]
Audience: [WHO]
Offer: [WHAT]
Budget: [RANGE]
Timeline: [DATES]
Colors: [HEX], Fonts: [NAMES]
Assets: [available]
Tone: [vibe]

Deliver:
1. Creative concept
2. Visual direction
3. Ad specs (Google + Meta, copy variations)
4. 3-email sequence with specs
5. Landing page wireframe
6. 5 social posts
7. Production checklist
8. Metrics
Notes: Copilot can create the ad mockups in Microsoft Designer and the email templates in Outlook. Use the production checklist in Planner to track asset completion across your team.
